name: Hot and Sour Soup 1
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Firm tofu, cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken breasts into 1/8-inch slices.
2. In a bowl, stir the chicken slices with 1 tablespoon soy sauce.
3. Heat oil in a Dutch oven and cook the chicken until tender (about 3 minutes). Remove the chicken from the pot.
4. Add the remaining soy sauce to the pot along with the next seven ingredients: bamboo shoots, tofu, white wine vinegar, bell pepper, bouillon cubes, cornstarch, and green onion. Heat the mixture to boiling, stirring frequently.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
6. Return the chicken and tofu to the pot. Stir gently until well combined.
7. In a small bowl, whisk together the remaining cornstarch with 1/3 cup water until smooth.
8. Gradually add this mixture into the simmering soup while stirring gently to achieve a slightly thickened, smooth consistency.
9. Beat the eggs in another small bowl and slowly pour them into the soup, stirring gently until set.
10. Sprinkle the green onion over the soup before serving.
